selected_important_turn.text: I have not really camped before so I am looking for as many supplies as possible.  What about I get 3 food, 3 firewood, and 1 water.
selected_important_turn.why_important: This is an early, high-demand counter that escalates the interaction into a zero-sum frame. It competes directly with the opponent's earlier specific request and sets a tough bargaining baseline that makes cooperative tradeoffs harder later.
selected_important_turn.why_improvable_or_worth_amplifying: The turn is very self-focused and high-demand with no effort to probe the opponent's flexibility or offer integrative solutions. It sacrifices opportunities to explore differences in item valuations (e.g., water might matter more to them) and so unnecessarily raises conflict and reduces options for mutually beneficial trades.
selected_important_turn.better_direction: Soften the demand and open information/trade space: acknowledge the opponent's request, explain your strongest needs briefly, and propose a tradeable option or ask which items they value most. Offer one concrete, less extreme compromise or a menu of options rather than claiming nearly everything.

expected_effect_on_negotiation.joint_gain: increase (by enabling integrative trades instead of locking into zero-sum demands)
expected_effect_on_negotiation.fairness: increase (by moving toward balanced, reasoned proposals)
expected_effect_on_negotiation.ease_of_agreement: increase (less resistance from opponent, fewer rejections)

value2reason.Low: i will need it when i go for hiking
value2reason.Medium: i will need it for emergency at night.
value2reason.High: i will need it for the long trip.

value2reason.Low: I like to hike and I will bring along my 2 dogs so extra water is needed for my puppies.
value2reason.Medium: I need to cook the food and keep warm at night.  I get cold very easily so the warmth of firewood would be really important.  I didn't spend a lot on a sleeping bag.
value2reason.High: I am a terrible cook so I need as much food as possible so I can prepare as best as I can as some of my cooking will be bad.  So I'd like all the food.

dialogue.text: hello
dialogue.speaker: mturk_agent_1

dialogue.text: Hello there
dialogue.speaker: mturk_agent_2

dialogue.text: how is your day going?
dialogue.speaker: mturk_agent_1

dialogue.text: So far so good.  What are your plans for your camping trip?
dialogue.speaker: mturk_agent_2

dialogue.text: yes i guess you too. i will need more supplies like 3 foods, 2 firewood and1 water
dialogue.speaker: mturk_agent_1

dialogue.text: I have not really camped before so I am looking for as many supplies as possible.  What about I get 3 food, 3 firewood, and 1 water.
dialogue.speaker: mturk_agent_2

dialogue.text: I'm planning for a long trip, so food is a top priority. Let's split the food evenly, and I'll take 2 firewood and 2 water. That way we both have enough for emergencies and hiking.
dialogue.speaker: mturk_agent_1

dialogue.text: I understand you need food, but I’m more concerned about cooking and staying warm. Let’s try 3 food, 2 firewood, and 1 water for me. That way I can cook properly and stay warm, and you get some water for your hike.
dialogue.speaker: mturk_agent_2

dialogue.text: I appreciate your concerns about cooking and warmth. Let’s compromise: I’ll take 2 food, 3 firewood, and 1 water. You can have 1 food, 0 firewood, and 2 water. This way, we both get essentials for the trip and emergencies.
dialogue.speaker: mturk_agent_1

dialogue.text: I value food the most for cooking, and firewood for warmth. Let’s try 3 food, 2 firewood, and 1 water for me. You can have 0 food, 1 firewood, and 2 water. That way, we both have essentials, and I can cook properly.
dialogue.speaker: mturk_agent_2

dialogue.text: I value food the most for the long trip, so I'd like 3 food, 1 firewood, and 1 water. You can have 0 food, 2 firewood, and 2 water. That way we both have essentials, and I can keep energy for the trip.
dialogue.speaker: mturk_agent_1
